name: studio-app
description: Studio — one sentence in, complete launch kit out. 9 parallel AI agents.

scripts.kill: pkill -f 'tsx watch src/server.ts' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'next dev -p 3000' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'next-server' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000,4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.restart: pnpm run kill && sleep 1 && pnpm dev
scripts.fresh: pnpm run kill && sleep 1 && rm -rf apps/frontend/.next && pnpm dev
